criteriaResults.evidence: types.ts: IncidentId=string @18, IncidentArtifactKindSchema 8-value enum @22-31, TimelineEventSchema @36-47 (source 5-enum), ObservationEntrySchema @53-60, ActionEntrySchema @65-72, ChangeEntrySchema @78-89 inverse REQUIRED.

timeline.ts exports 9 functions. createIncident @148-200 creates all 8 artifacts. Per-incidentId Promise-chain mutex @219+. appendOneLine @69-77 uses fs.open O_WRONLY|O_APPEND|O_CREAT + fh.chmod(0o600).
deriveSlug @113-124: first 3 tokens, strip non-[a-z0-9], join '-', truncate 30, fallback 'untitled'. Test @150 confirms '500 errors on checkout' → /^inc-\d{8}-500-errors-on$/.
All 4 domain append helpers double-write target+timeline.jsonl in same mutex tick. Tests verify all 4 paths produce both files.

ChangeEntrySchema.inverse @types.ts 78-89 NOT .optional(). appendChange @timeline.ts 311 parse-before-mutex. Test passes object w/o inverse expecting rejects.toThrow(/inverse/) and verifies changelog.jsonl remains empty.

IncidentMetadataSchema @types.ts 126-134 all 7 fields, status enum 5 values (investigating/remediating/monitoring/resolved/aborted). setIncidentStatus @timeline.ts 379-401 with atomic temp+rename + resolvedAt auto-set.
listIncidents @timeline.ts 415-457 ENOENT→[], sort by createdAt desc. Test with 3 incidents (15ms delays for distinct timestamps) verifies desc order.

tests/incident/timeline.test.ts 31 tests using mkdtemp fixture (no repo pollution). Covers createIncident, all 5 append helpers, listIncidents, setIncidentStatus, mutex correctness (100 parallel), file mode 0o600, slug edge cases.
All 4 strategies exit 0. 951 tests pass (+31 from 920 baseline).

summary: All 9 criteria pass on iter 1. ChangeEntry.inverse REQUIRED at zod level verified by tests. Double-write to timeline.jsonl from every domain append. Mutex+fh.chmod(0o600) atomic pattern mirrors audit.ts. listIncidents handles missing dir. 31 new tests; baseline 920 preserved.
